name: Nasty Surprise
description: A Hyperion grenade with Longbow delivery, teleporting to the target point before the first blast. It then drops up to four child grenades above nearby enemies, or piles the unused ones onto the impact point if there are not enough targets. That gives it a flexible mix of crowd tagging and focused burst, though its damage and blast radius are lower than many competing grenades.
notes: The red text references a gag from the film UHF. It is also the only Hyperion grenade mod that is not a Singularity type.

special.description: Uses Longbow delivery. After the initial blast, up to four child grenades drop from above onto nearby enemies, and any unused child grenades fall at the target point. In exchange, it has reduced damage and blast radius.
special.title: Supplies!
